corpus.detail: skipped because no manifest directory was provided

performance_budget.detail: skipped because trace profiling is unavailable

recommendation.fallback_reason: Changed files touch the repo-audit control surface, so targeted Python proof and recommendation verification are recommended instead of widening to the full supported repo-audit profile.

coverage.reason: Touched source files should be proven by focused changed-line coverage when executable diff lines exist, or touched-file coverage otherwise.

focused_behavior_test.reason: Code changes require at least one focused owner pytest target.

suggested_commands: python scripts/run_repo_python.py -m pytest --no-cov tests/test_pipeline_run.py tests/test_repo_audit.py tests/test_recommendation_routing.py -x -q --tb=short
mutation_guidance.suggestion: Prefer mutation-style or property-style assertions for parser, validation, and routing seams before treating the repo-wide coverage percentage as sufficient proof.

recommended_checks.ai_summary: Use after touched Python edits for fast style, import-order, and lint hygiene proof.
